description: Enable storage locations and establish a cyclic counting schedule by creating three zones under the parent location WH/Stock: Zone A (15-day frequency), Zone B (30-day frequency), and Zone C (90-day frequency). Transfer all stock for SKU ABC-A-001 (NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU) to Zone A, SKU ABC-B-001 (ASUS ROG Crosshair X670E Hero) to Zone B, and SKU ABC-C-001 (Southwire Cat6 CMP Plenum 1000ft) to Zone C. Ensure no inventory for these items remains in the parent WH/Stock location.
